note: Open-source IoT and energy-management platform relevant to local device coordination and energy hubs.

title: The Open Energy Modelling Framework (oemof) - A new approach to facilitate open science in energy system modelling
note: Open energy system modeling reference for planning decentralized generation and storage portfolios.
